creator: 製卡
media_item_delete_confirmation: 此操作將從歷史記錄中移除該項目。確定繼續嗎？
dictionaries_delete_confirmation: 刪除辭典將同時清除所有歷史搜尋結果。確定繼續嗎？
mappings_delete_confirmation: 此設定檔將被刪除。確定繼續嗎？
catalog_delete_confirmation: 此目錄將被刪除。確定繼續嗎？
dictionaries_menu_empty: 請先匯入辭典以便使用
options_github: 在 GitHub 檢視儲存庫
dialog_content_dictionary_clear: 清空辭典資料庫會同時清除所有歷史搜尋結果。
dialog_content_dictionary_delete: 單獨刪除辭典可能比清空整個資料庫耗時更長，且會清除所有歷史搜尋結果。
delete_dictionary_data: 正在清除所有辭典資料…
legalese:
一款專注的 Android 日語 EPUB 閱讀器。

hibiki 為自由開源軟體。完整的授權和致謝請見專案儲存庫。
import_file_extension_invalid: 此格式僅接受以下副檔名的檔案：$extensions
model_to_map: 新設定檔使用的卡片類型
error_profile_name_content: 同名設定檔已存在或名稱無效，無法儲存。
error_standard_profile_name_content: 無法重新命名標準設定檔。
error_ankidroid_api_content:
與 AnkiDroid 通訊時發生錯誤。

請確認 AnkiDroid 的背景服務已啟用，並已授予所需權限。
error_model_missing_content:
目前設定檔對應的卡片類型已不存在。

該設定檔將被刪除，並自動切換到標準設定檔。
error_model_changed_content:
目前設定檔對應的卡片類型欄位數量已變更。

目前設定檔的欄位已重設，需要重新設定。
creator_exporting_as_enhancements_editin: 編輯設定檔的增強功能
info_enhancements: 增強功能可在製卡前自動編輯欄位。在欄位右側的槽位中選擇以啟用增強，每個欄位最多可使用五個右側槽位。左側槽位中的增強會在即時製卡或開啟製卡工具時自動套用。
info_actions: 快捷操作可對辭典搜尋結果執行即時製卡或其他自動化。透過下方槽位分配操作，最多可使用六個槽位。
no_more_available_enhancements: 此欄位沒有更多可用的增強功能
no_more_available_quick_actions: 沒有更多可用的快捷操作
stash_clear_description: 所有內容將被清除。確定嗎？
stash_nothing_to_pop: 暫存區沒有可彈出的項目。
clear_dictionary_description: 此操作將清除所有歷史辭典搜尋結果。確定嗎？
clear_search_description: 此操作將清除該歷史中的所有搜尋詞。確定嗎？
clear_creator_description: 此操作將清空所有欄位。確定嗎？
info_fields: 欄位會根據即時匯出前所選詞條或開啟製卡工具時所選詞條自動填入。要讓某欄位參與卡片匯出，需要在下方啟用並在目前選定的匯出設定檔中對應。可摺疊已啟用的欄位以減少編輯時的雜亂。手動編輯卡片時，可透過製卡工具右上角的清除按鈕快速清空這些隱藏欄位。
field_fallback_used: $field 欄位使用 $secondField 作為備選搜尋詞。
card_export_not_configured: Anki 尚未設定。請開啟 Anki 設定並點擊「擷取」。
info_incognito_on: 無痕模式已開啟。辭典、媒體和搜尋歷史不會被記錄。
info_incognito_off: 無痕模式已關閉。辭典、媒體和搜尋歷史將被記錄。
exit_media_description: 此操作將返回主選單。確定嗎？
clear_browser_description: 此操作將清除所有使用網頁內容的媒體來源的瀏覽資料。確定嗎？
ttu_no_books_added: 書庫中尚未有任何書籍
local_media_directory_empty: 目錄內沒有資料夾或影片
player_option_drag_to_select: 使用拖曳方式選擇字幕
player_option_tap_to_select: 使用點擊方式選擇字幕
player_option_blur_options: 設定模糊元件顏色與模糊程度
player_option_blur_reset: 重設模糊元件尺寸與位置
player_option_subtitle_always_above_bott: 始終將字幕顯示在底部列上方
no_current_media: 播放或重新整理媒體以取得歌詞
wrap_image_audio: 匯出時包含圖片/音訊 HTML 標籤
clear_text_description: 此操作將清除所有已接收文字。確定嗎？
close_connection_description: 此操作將結束 WebSocket 連線並清除所有已接收文字。確定嗎？
use_slow_import: 慢速匯入（匯入失敗時使用）
extend_page_beyond_navbar: 頁面延伸至導覽列之外
silent_export_on: 製卡工具將在匯出卡片後自動關閉。
silent_export_off: 製卡工具在匯出卡片後不再自動關閉。
export_profile_empty: 目前匯出設定檔沒有設定任何欄位，需要先進行設定。
error_export_media_ankidroid: 匯出媒體至 AnkiDroid 時發生錯誤。
error_add_note: 向 AnkiDroid 新增卡片時發生錯誤。
first_time_setup_description: 歡迎使用 hibiki！請選擇目標語言，我們會為你準備一個預設設定檔，稍後可隨時更改。
maximum_terms: 結果中的詞頭數量上限
use_br_tags: 匯出時以換行標籤代替換行符號
prepend_dictionary_names: 在釋義前顯示辭典名稱
tap_empty_hide_chrome: 點擊空白處隱藏控制列
storage_permissions: 請授予以下權限以便匯出到 AnkiDroid。
network_subtitles_warning: 網路串流不支援內嵌字幕。
accessibility: 需要無障礙權限才能從事件中擷取文字。
clear_message_description: 此操作將清除所有訊息並開啟新對話。確定嗎？
error_chatgpt_response: 請求失敗或被限流。請稍後再試或檢查你的使用額度。
name: 名稱
duplicate_catalog: 此 URL 的目錄已存在。
invalid_mokuro_file: 該檔案不是由 Mokuro 產生的 HTML 檔案。
adapt_ttu_theme: 使辭典彈出視窗配合主題
field_locked: $field 已鎖定，匯出時不會清空（製卡工具啟用期間）。
field_unlocked: $field 已解鎖，匯出時將被清空。
processing_embedded_subtitles: 內嵌字幕處理中，請稍後再試。
structured_content_first: 有 $i 筆釋義不支援結構化內容，已略過。
structured_content_second: 請考慮使用該辭典的非結構化版本。
chatgpt_error: 從 ChatGPT 取得回應時發生錯誤。
subtitle_delay_set: 字幕延遲已設定為 $ms 毫秒。
server_port_in_use: 本機伺服器連接埠已被佔用
design_system_hint: 切換應用程式的視覺風格
info_standard_update: 新的標準設定檔卡片類型
info_standard_update_content:
標準設定檔現已使用『hibiki Kinomoto』卡片類型。

舊版標準設定檔仍保留以相容。
error_parsing_hosts_file: 解析 hosts 檔案時發生錯誤。
player_show_subtitle_in_notification: 在媒體通知中顯示字幕
video_unavailable_content: 無法取得影片串流。可能存在限制導致無法觀看該影片。
video_file_error_content: 無法載入影片檔案。請確認該檔案存在並位於應用程式可存取的目錄中。
srt_import_pick_srt: 選擇字幕檔（可與 EPUB、音訊組合）
srt_no_subtitle_files: 所選目錄中未找到字幕檔
srt_import_missing_input: 請至少選擇 EPUB 或字幕檔
srt_import_audio_needs_subtitle: 音訊需要搭配字幕使用（給現有 EPUB 附加音訊請在書架長按該書）
srt_no_audio_files: 所選目錄中沒有音訊檔案
image_pause_hint: 播放時遇到圖片自動暫停。
srt_epub_not_ready: 書籍尚未就緒 — 請重新匯入
srt_audio_unresolved: 未找到音訊檔案 — 請重新附加
follow_audio_paused: 音頻跟隨已暫停（使用者手動翻頁）
floating_lyric_hint: 在其他應用程式上方顯示目前句子。
av_sync_hint: 正數 = 音訊先於文字，往回撥字幕條目；負數 = 音訊延遲。
tap_seek_hint: 點擊句子跳轉音訊到對應位置。
ttu_vert_kerning_hint: 調整直排 CJK 字元間距。
ttu_font_vpal_hint: 直排時使用比例標點替代字形。
ttu_reader_styles_hint: 優先使用書籍自帶的 CSS 樣式，而非閱讀器預設樣式。
ttu_vert_text_orient_hint: 混合：旋轉西文；直立：所有字元保持直立。
rematch_adjust_window: 調整搜尋視窗重新比對
ttu_not_bound_cannot_rematch: 本書未繫結 ttu，無法重跑比對
sasayaki_no_sections: 未讀到 ttu 章節文字，無法自動比對
sasayaki_no_cues_to_match: 沒有字幕條目可供比對
sasayaki_all_zero: 所有視窗命中率都是 0，請手動調整
sasayaki_no_stored_cues: 沒有已存字幕條目，無法重跑
sasayaki_window_hint: 每條字幕在正文裡向前找的字元數。命中率低時可左右調整，過大容易被短雜訊字幕拉偏游標。
sasayaki_threshold_hint: 模糊比對的最低相似度（Dice 係數）。降低可容忍更多文字差異，但太低會誤比對。
auto_select_search_window_hint: 匯入時探測多檔視窗，取命中率最高的那檔
custom_fonts_drag_hint: 拖曳以調整字型優先順序
custom_fonts_no_fonts_in_archive: 壓縮檔中未找到字型檔案
theme_code_copied: 主題代碼已複製到剪貼簿
seed_color_desc: 自動產生下方所有預設顏色
color_primary_desc: 音訊醒目標示、按鈕、開關
selection_color_desc: 閱讀器文字選取醒目標示
color_sasayaki_desc: 有聲書字幕同步醒目標示
anki_default_deck_hint: 製卡時預設將卡片加入此牌組。
anki_default_profile_hint: 決定匯出卡片時使用的卡片類型和欄位對應。
anki_silent_export_hint: 成功匯出卡片後自動關閉製卡工具。
anki_auto_tag_hint: 製卡時自動將目前書名加入為標籤。
anki_duplicate_check_hint: 選擇匯出前檢查哪些卡片類型中是否已有重複。
anki_tags_hint: 以空格分隔，每張卡片都會加入
anki_allow_duplicates_hint: 新增卡片時跳過重複檢查
anki_compact_glossaries_hint: 使用精簡格式顯示釋義
hint_font_size: 調整正文字型大小（像素）。
hint_line_height: 調整行距，數值越大行距越寬，閱讀更舒適。
hint_text_indentation: 每段首行縮排的字元數。
hint_margin: 閱讀區域的外邊距（像素）。
hint_max_width_height: 閱讀區域的最大寬度（橫排）或高度（直排）。設為自動則佔滿螢幕。
hint_page_columns: 每頁顯示的欄數。設為自動時根據螢幕尺寸自行決定。
hint_writing_direction: 橫排：從左到右。直排：傳統日文從上到下、從右到左排列。
hint_view_mode: 翻頁模式：像書一樣翻頁。連續捲動：無分頁，自由捲動閱讀。
hint_vert_text_orient: 混合：數字和西文字母旋轉為橫向。直立：所有字元保持直立。
anki_manage_profiles_hint: 設定匯出到 AnkiDroid 時各欄位的對應方式。每個設定檔繫結一個 Anki 筆記類型，定義 hibiki 的哪個欄位填入 Anki 的哪個欄位。
no_collections: 沒有書籤或保存的句子
font_desc_klee_one: 手寫教科書體 · 清晰易讀 · 建議搭配 Noto Sans JP 回退
font_desc_noto_sans_jp: Google/Adobe 黑體 · 日語字形優先 · 可變字重
font_desc_noto_serif_jp: Google/Adobe 宋體 · 日語字形優先 · 適合豎排閱讀
font_desc_noto_sans_sc: Google/Adobe 黑體 · 簡中字形優先 · 搭配日文字體做回退
font_desc_noto_serif_sc: Google/Adobe 宋體 · 簡中字形優先 · 搭配日文字體做回退
font_desc_noto_sans_tc: Google/Adobe 黑體 · 繁中字形優先
font_desc_shippori_mincho: 優雅明朝體 · 文學作品推薦 · 建議搭配 Noto Sans JP 回退
font_desc_zen_old_mincho: 復古明朝體 · 古典文學風格 · 建議搭配 Noto Sans JP 回退
font_desc_zen_maru_gothic: 柔和圓潤黑體 · 建議搭配 Noto Sans JP 回退
font_desc_mplus_rounded_1c: 圓角可愛風格 · 適合輕小說 · 建議搭配 Noto Sans JP 回退
font_desc_hina_mincho: 柔和裝飾性明朝體 · 建議搭配 Noto Sans JP 回退
font_desc_zen_kaku_gothic_new: 現代角黑體 · 通用閱讀 · 建議搭配 Noto Sans JP 回退
anki_export_not_implemented: 此平台尚未實作 Anki 匯出功能。
icon_custom_confirm_body: 將使用所選圖片建立主畫面捷徑。是否繼續？
icon_custom_hint: 點擊圖示切換，或在下方選擇自訂圖片。
audiobook_import_error_disk_full: 磁碟空間不足。所需空間：$size
book_css_editor_confirm_reset: 將此檔案的 CSS 重設為預設值？
book_css_editor_confirm_reset_all: 將所有檔案的 CSS 重設為預設值？
book_css_editor_no_css_files: 此書中未找到 CSS 檔案。
book_css_editor_no_extract_dir: 未找到書籍目錄。請重新匯入書籍以編輯 CSS。
book_css_editor_unsaved_changes_message: 有未儲存的變更。是否捨棄？
floating_lyric_permission_hint: 顯示懸浮歌詞需要懸浮視窗權限。
lyrics_font_size_hint: 歌詞字體大小獨立於書籍模式
lyrics_mode_hint_body: 歌詞模式有自己的字體大小設定。你可以在 ⚙ 設定 → 排版 中調整。
low_memory_mode_hint: 減少快取和記憶體使用，適合低階裝置。部分變更需重啟後生效。
low_memory_mode_suggestion: 可嘗試在 設定 → 其他設定 中開啟低記憶體模式。
srt_import_hint_epub_or_srt: 選擇 EPUB 或字幕檔進行匯入。
tag_no_books_for_filter: 沒有書籍符合所選標籤。
tag_no_tags_hint: 還沒有標籤。建立一個開始吧。
batch_delete_confirm: 確定刪除 $n 本書？此操作不可撤銷。
batch_tag_added: 已為 $n 本書添加標籤「$name」。
batch_tag_removed: 已從 $n 本書移除標籤「$name」。
update_debug_channel_warning: 偵錯頻道的建置版本可能不穩定。使用風險自負。
audio_source_dns_error: 音頻來源連線失敗：無法解析 "${host}" — 請檢查網絡，或在設定中移除此來源
audio_source_timeout: 音頻來源逾時："${host}" — 伺服器無回應，請稍後再試或更換來源
sync_summary: 雲端、區域網與本機備份
no_matching_audio_cue: No matching audio for this sentence
sync_exit_warning: Sync is still in progress. Exiting now may cause data loss.
sync_content_warning: Large files will use storage space and data
reader_content_timeout: Content loading timed out. Reopen if display is abnormal
backup_export_hint: Save all settings, reading progress, and statistics to a file
backup_import_hint: Restore from a backup file. The app will restart.
backup_import_confirm:
This will replace all current data with the backup from $date.

$bookCount books, $statsCount statistics records.

The app will restart after restore.
backup_schema_newer: This backup requires a newer version of the app (schema $version). Please update first.
shortcut_reset_confirm: Reset all shortcuts in this section to defaults?
sync_err_network: Cannot reach the server — check your network or proxy settings.
sync_err_timeout: Connection timed out — the server did not respond in time.
sync_err_auth_expired: Sign-in expired — please sign in again.
sync_server_port_in_use: Port $port is already in use — pick a different port.
sync_lan_scan_failed: Scan failed — check network permissions or firewall.
sync_section_host_server: This device as a sync server
sync_section_host_server_footer: Let other devices sync from this device. Independent of the sync backend above.
backup_import_preserve_sync_note: Your sync settings on this device (account and credentials) will be kept.
backup_import_settings_on_hint: Full restore: fonts, appearance and profiles come from the backup.
backup_import_settings_off_hint: Keep this device's fonts/appearance/profiles; restore only books & reading data.
reader_unsupported_platform: The reader is not yet available on this platform.
microphone_permission_denied: Microphone permission is required to record.
anki_connect_api_key_hint: Leave empty unless AnkiConnect requires a key
app_ui_scale_hint: Scales app text and spacing. Lower it on large screens if controls feel oversized.
sync_dictionary_warning: Dictionary packages can be large and include imported dictionary resources.
remote_dict_lookup_hint: When local dictionaries miss, query the configured Hibiki server
audio_source_url_invalid: Link must be http(s) and contain a term or reading placeholder
local_audio_no_sources: No sources found in this database
sync_pair_request_body: A device is requesting to pair. Allow it to sync with this device?
sync_pair_unavailable: The other device isn't ready or is on an older version. Update it and enable sync, then try again.
sync_role_locked_by_server: This device is hosting as a server. Turn off the server before connecting to other devices.
sync_role_locked_by_client: Already connected to another device. Remove the connection before hosting as a server.
sync_audiobook_files_warning: Audio and subtitles can be large.
book_import_duplicate_message: A book named "$name" already exists. Import it anyway? "Yes" imports with a numbered suffix; "No" cancels.
sync_now_hint: Run a full two-way sync with the cloud now
sync_compare_delete_confirm: 確定要從遠端刪除「$name」嗎？本機資料會保留，此操作無法復原。
sync_local_audio_warning: Syncs local audio source databases (may be large)
video_import_subtitle_optional: Optional external subtitle (you can switch between embedded/external subtitles anytime during playback)
video_setting_av_delay_hint: 正數 = 字幕延後（字幕整體往後撥）；負數 = 字幕提前。可拖滑桿、按 ± 或直接輸入數值。
sync_compare_no_content: Cloud data only — no book to download
anki_create_lapis_hint: Adds the Lapis note type and a Lapis deck to Anki, then selects them.
anki_create_lapis_success: Lapis note type and deck created.
anki_create_lapis_exists: Lapis note type and deck already exist — selected them.
video_import_folder_empty: No video files found in this folder
video_setting_shaders_hint: Apply mpv GLSL shaders (e.g. Anime4K). Desktop only.
video_jimaku_api_key_hint: Get a free API key at jimaku.cc/account
video_jimaku_no_key: Enter your Jimaku API key first
video_shader_anime4k_hint: Pick a preset to download. After downloading, tick it in the list to enable. Desktop only.
video_shader_preset_mode_a_fast: For most 1080p anime. Lighter GPU load.
video_shader_preset_mode_b_fast: For older 720p anime with resampling artifacts.
video_shader_preset_mode_c_fast: For old SD (480p) anime with compression smearing.
video_shader_preset_mode_a_hq: Highest quality for 1080p anime. Needs a strong GPU.
video_subtitle_load_failed: Couldn't load this subtitle (graphic or unsupported track): $label
drag_drop_need_card_target: Drop subtitles or audio onto a book or video
sync_server_mode_active: This device is a sync server
sync_server_mode_clients_drive: Connected clients start the sync — no manual sync needed here.
video_setting_subtitle_blur_hint: Hide subtitles by default; hover or tap to reveal for listening practice.
video_setting_mpv_raw: Extra mpv options (one per line, key=value)
video_setting_mpv_raw_hint: Desktop only; options that cannot apply at runtime (e.g. vo, profile) are ignored. SVP/RIFE need external tools and are not supported.
log_upload_consent_body: The log text (which may include error messages, file paths, and book titles) plus your app version, platform, and device model will be uploaded to the developer's server to help diagnose issues. This only happens when you tap upload — nothing is sent automatically.
texthooker_enabled_hint: Connect to Textractor/mpv/agent and look up incoming text
yomitan_api_server_hint: Let yomitan-api clients query Hibiki's dictionaries (port 19633)
desktop_clipboard_enabled_hint: Watch clipboard + global hotkey to pop a lookup window (desktop)
texthooker_experimental_banner: Texthooker is experimental — live text, lookup and card creation may be unstable.
db_downgrade_message: This database was created by a newer version of Hibiki (schema v$dbVersion). Your current app is too old (v$appVersion). Opening was blocked to protect your data. Please update the app and try again.
video_subtitle_graphic_hint: Graphic subtitle · shown on video · no word lookup
video_subtitle_graphic_shown: Graphic subtitle shown on video (no word lookup): $label
focus_navigation_enabled_hint: Move focus with arrow keys or a gamepad and show a focus ring.
video_shader_mpv_dir_empty: No shaders found in that folder
video_shader_preset_mode_b_hq: High quality for older 720p anime with resampling artifacts. Needs a strong GPU.
video_shader_preset_mode_c_hq: High quality for old SD (480p) anime with compression smearing. Needs a strong GPU.
floating_lyric_click_lookup: Tap floating subtitle to look up
floating_lyric_click_lookup_hint: Keep this on with position lock if you still want word lookup.
desktop_clipboard_window_mode_hint: Controls whether Hibiki stays above other windows. Only watches the clipboard and global hotkey on the lookup tab.
popup_instant_scroll_hint: Jump the lookup popup by fixed distances without animated scrolling for e-ink screens.
remote_video_load_failed: Could not load paired device videos
remote_book_load_failed: Could not load paired device books
video_drop_audio_unsupported: Drop subtitle files onto the current video. Audio files cannot be attached here.
video_quality_enhancement_hint: 開啟後用 mpv 內建高畫質縮放讓畫面更清晰，動畫、真人影視/電視劇都適用。想用 Anime4K 等著色器進一步增強，請在播放影片時的「畫質增強」裡選擇檔位。
video_shader_builtin_mpv_quality_hint: 默认 mpv 缩放选项。下面的外部着色器仍需下载后单独勾选启用。
video_shader_import_from_mpv_hint: 自动搜索本机 mpv；未找到时可手动选择 mpv 目录。
video_shader_first_use_title: 试试 Anime4K 画质增强
video_shader_first_use_body: 想让动画画面更清晰，可以进入“画质增强”并点击“下载 Anime4K 推荐着色器”。下载后在已安装列表里勾选即可启用。
sync_err_invalid_client: Client credentials are invalid for this build — please update the app.
sync_err_not_configured: Google sync credentials are not configured in this build.
floating_lyric_unavailable_hint: Could not show the floating subtitle window.
video_shader_tier_off_hint: No enhancement. Plays the original video as-is.
video_shader_tier_low_hint: mpv 內建銳化（ewa_lanczossharp）。對任何影片都有效（動畫與真人皆可），無需下載、GPU 負載最低。集顯或舊顯卡（N卡 GTX 1050、A卡 RX 560、Intel 核顯）選這檔。
video_shader_tier_medium_hint: Anime4K Fast。對動畫效果最佳，真人電影/電視劇也能用（提升較小）。中端 GPU 可跑（N卡 GTX 1660 / RTX 3050，A卡 RX 6600）。
video_shader_tier_high_hint: Anime4K HQ。更銳利，對動畫效果最佳，真人內容也可用（提升較小）。需要中高端 GPU（N卡 RTX 4060 / RTX 3070，A卡 RX 6700 XT / RX 7700 XT）。
video_shader_tier_ultra_hint: ArtCNN C4F32，HD 動畫最佳畫質，真人內容也可用（提升較小）。需要旗艦 GPU（N卡 RTX 4080 / RTX 5090，A卡 RX 7900 XTX）。顯卡較弱請往低檔選。
video_shader_tier_custom_hint: Custom shader selection. Pick a tier above to switch to a preset.
video_shader_mobile_perf_hint: On phones, shaders apply only on the standard GPU render path and effectiveness varies by device GPU; higher tiers may drop frames or heat up. Try Low/Medium first and check the result on your device.
video_subtitle_attach_playlist_hint: Open the playlist to attach a subtitle per episode
video_brightness_unsupported: Brightness control not available on this platform
video_subtitle_color_note: Subtitle colors are set inside the video player.
theme_seed_preview_hint: Swatches below preview the colors actually generated from your seed. To force a specific color as the primary accent, turn on the Primary toggle and pick it explicitly.
backup_export_categories_hint: Selected categories are packed into the backup. The database (books, statistics, favorites, profiles, settings) is always included.
popup_bottom_docked_hint: Pin the lookup popup as a full-width panel at the bottom of the screen instead of following the looked-up word.
anki_tag_include_hibiki_hint: Mark every card mined by Hibiki
reverse_arrow_page_turn: 反轉鍵盤左右鍵翻頁方向
video_setting_picture_fit_hint: How the picture fills the player area
video_setting_picture_fit_contain: Fit keep ratio add black bars
video_setting_double_tap_hint: Double-tap the left or right of the video to seek
video_setting_immersive_mode_hint: Controls what remains available after pressing the side lock button
startup_default_dictionary_tab_hint: Start the home screen on the lookup tab instead of the current default.
video_setting_danmaku_enabled_hint: Render local or matched danmaku over the video without blocking controls.
video_setting_danmaku_online_hint: When no usable local sidecar exists, match the opened video with Dandanplay and fetch related comments.
video_setting_danmaku_max_active_hint: Caps comments rendered per frame to keep large files responsive.
video_setting_long_press_speed_hint: Temporarily use this speed while holding the video.
video_favorite_sentences_empty: No saved sentences in this episode
video_subtitle_list_select_for_card: 選入詞卡（製卡時合併為例句）
anki_error_collection_unavailable: AnkiDroid's collection is currently unavailable. Open AnkiDroid at least once, make sure it isn't syncing and the API is enabled, then retry.
video_bottom_prev_cue: Previous subtitle (back a bit if none)
video_bottom_next_cue: Next subtitle (forward a bit if none)
audio_clip_failed: Couldn't extract the audio clip — the audio source may be missing or unreadable
floating_lyric_no_audio: This book has no audio to listen to
lyrics_text_color_hint: Use a custom color for lyrics text instead of following the theme
floating_lyric_text_opacity_hint: Lower this to make the floating subtitle text more transparent
floating_lyric_button_bg_opacity_hint: Adjust how transparent the floating subtitle control buttons are
video_control_customize_hint: Choose where each button sits on the player, or move it out.
popup_append_sentence_tooltip: Add this sentence to the card
anki_not_configured: Tap Refresh to load your Anki decks and note types.
anki_refresh_hint: After creating or renaming a deck or note type in Anki, tap here to refresh.
video_control_palette_hint: Drag a button into a slot to add it; a button can sit in several slots.
video_clip_export_remote_download_requir: Download the remote video to this device before exporting a clip
video_clip_export_source_changed: Video source changed; clip export cancelled
update_install_incomplete_message: The installer started, but Hibiki is still on the previous version. Check the installer log below.
update_install_launch_failed_message: Hibiki could not start the installer for version $version. Check the log path below.
update_install_log_observed: Installer log was created during the post-launch check.
update_install_log_not_observed: Installer log was not created during the post-launch check.
video_control_reject_required: Required controls must stay on the player.
video_control_reject_volume_bottom: Volume can only sit on the bottom bar.
video_control_reject_unavailable: This control cannot be placed there.
update_install_manual_close_retry: Close Hibiki from the listed PID/path, then retry the update or run the installer again.
update_install_restart_windows_hint: If the listed processes are closed but libmpv-2.dll is still locked, restart Windows and install again.
shortcut_conflict_replace_confirm: 該快捷鍵已被「$s」佔用。要移到目前動作嗎？
drag_drop_unsupported_on_books: Drop book files here. Switch to Video or Dictionaries for those files.
drag_drop_unsupported_on_video: Drop videos, playlists, or subtitles here. Switch to Books or Dictionaries for those files.
drag_drop_unsupported_on_dictionary: Drop .zip, .dsl, or .mdx dictionary files here. CSS files only work together with a dictionary package.
video_drop_subtitle_only: Drop subtitle files onto the current video.
update_install_parent_exit_observed: Hibiki exited before the installer was launched.
update_install_parent_exit_not_observed: The update launcher did not observe Hibiki exiting before the installer launch.
video_control_reset_layout_hint: Restore moved and removed buttons to the default player layout.
floating_lyric_bg_opacity_hint: Lower this to make the floating subtitle bar more transparent so it blocks less of your view
